CLAUSE.NAME: StandardWording-1
CLAUSE.value: We, CS Bank, hereby provide our conclusive irrevocable [[[GTEE_TYPE]]] for [[[GTEE_CCY]]].[[[GTEE_AMT]]] inclusive of accrued interest and all other charges, as security for your undertakings with [[[APPL_NM]]]. . We hereby irrevocably without objection undertake to pay to you on your first written demand irrespective of the legal effects of the above mentioned relationship and waiving all rights of objection and defenc arising from said relationship, any amount not-exceeding [[[GTEE_CCY]]].[[[GTEE_AMT]]] being the outstanding, inclusive of interest and all other charges payable as on the date of the claim, upon receipt of your request for payment and your confirmation in writing by authenticated signatory.
